Robin DR400/180 Regent - G-BXRL - 1/5 group share, Derby

Aircraft Type: Single Engine Fixed Wing
Year: 1996
Make: Robin
Model: DR400/180 Regent
Reg Number: G-BXRL
Airframe Hours: 3890
Engine Make: Lycoming O-360-A3A
Engine Hours: 1820 SMOH (overhauled 2017)
Prop Make: Sensenich fixed pitch
ARC: Valid to September 2025
Annual: Completed September 2024

Price: £8,500 (1/5 share, total aircraft value ~£42,500)

Avionics: Garmin GNS 430 (non-WAAS), Garmin GTX 327 Mode C transponder, Garmin 696 GPS moving map, KI 525A HSI, King KAP 140 two-axis autopilot with altitude hold. Full IFR instruments.

UK CofA. Type Certificated. IFR equipped but approaching TBO.

Based at Derby Airfield (EGBD). Hangared in group hangar. Well-maintained by professional engineer.

Notes: Excellent 1/5 group share in a well-maintained DR400. KAP 140 autopilot, GNS 430 nav — capable cross-country IFR machine. Engine is at 1820 hours — mid-life (TBO 2000 hours), expect overhaul in 3-5 years. Monthly group fees approx £150.
